title: Cauldron Concrete
description: Powder into a cauldron gets you concrete! Vanilla friendly and perfect for servers wanting a survival experience of the cauldron concrete functionality from Vanilla tweaks.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1054ae832db2d1725e66dd9a0acc7b6b0a692e5_0.webp)

Inspired by Vanilla Tweaks' Cauldron Concrete datapack, this is a more lag efficient plugin based version! Toss in your concrete powder, and watch the magic happen! 

_This was created for use on my forever world, called "derex smp". Check it out in action, server ip: `mc.longhorns.dev`_

### Features:
- Drop your powder into a water cauldron, and see your concrete return! 
- It remains vanilla friendly by lowering the water level of the cauldron, meaning players will have to find a clever way to replenish the cauldron, leading to more automation options in vanilla Minecraft while saving so much time.
- Optimized for servers! Datapacks do checks way too often, and using unoptimized Minecraft functions. This plugin will only listen for powder itself in the cauldron block, leading to much less performance impacts.

Created for use on my [University Minecraft world (derex smp)](https://derec4.github.io/derexsmp/notbanlist) + randos
